memory_truth.doctrine: Latest source-backed receipt truth beats stale chat memory. Compressed memory carries source pointers and creates debt when revised facts conflict.

research_basis.lesson: Agents struggle with revised facts and multi-target aggregation across long, interfering contexts.
Compact working context should use stable indices that can dereference exact past evidence.
Long-running agents need active pruning of raw history while preserving key learnings.

research_basis.source: Anthropic context engineering and memory guidance
research_basis.lesson: Stale tool results should be cleared, valuable knowledge should live outside context, and relevant context must be curated.

drills.question: Is Codexa command rail 8097 currently up?
Is Codexa online?
drills.rule: Do not collapse partial rail truth into a single green system claim.
Compressed memory must carry source pointers that can recover exact receipt truth.
Semantic similarity is not enough; revised facts need freshness and source-backed selection.

drills.air:
R: full_project.status=WITH_GAPS @ src:receipt.orangebox-project.20260607T014800Z#$.full_project.status
R: frontend_lane.ops_chat_touch_allowed=FALSE @ src:receipt.orangebox-project.20260607T014800Z.visual#$.frontend_lane.ops_chat_touch_allowed
R: local_ops.status=GREEN @ src:receipt.orangebox-local.20260607T014700Z#$.local_ops.status
R: codexa.command_rail_8097=DEAD @ src:receipt.codexa-alert.20260607T011000Z#$.codexa.command_rail_8097
R: codexa.receipts_8099=OPEN @ src:receipt.codexa-alert.20260607T011000Z.receipts#$.codexa.receipts_8099
drills.rule: Hot memory gets compact facts plus pointers, not raw chat/history flooding.

debt_events.repair_hint: Refresh memory/source packet and require latest receipt pointer before status claims.

drills.rule: A stale fact that conflicts with latest receipt truth creates compression debt instead of silent confidence.

memory_truth.next_action: Keep memory:doctor in the Ops proof chain before promoting chatbackup, AtomSmasher compression, retrieval, or Knowledge Engine upgrades.

link_alert.message: Codexa/AI Box is reachable. Command rail and Ollama/model proof responded; heavy-lane routing can be considered after the model doctor is green.

signal_hygiene.alert_fatigue_policy: Popup only on status change or cooldown. Health/reality receipts keep logging every run.
signal_hygiene.summary_line: Codexa ready; local Ops can continue; full two-machine routing remains gated.

signal_hygiene.alert_fatigue_policy: Popup only on status change or cooldown. Health/reality receipts keep logging every run.
signal_hygiene.summary_line: Codexa ready; local Ops can continue; full two-machine routing remains gated.

codexa_alert.message: Codexa/AI Box is reachable. Command rail and Ollama/model proof responded; heavy-lane routing can be considered after the model doctor is green.

operator_transparency.next_safe_action: Run system:full-green when the operator wants full distributed proof.

warnings: AI Box SMB port is visible, but share access is denied/unavailable for staging.
Ops gap ledger has 1 named open gap(s); work highest-severity first.
next_actions: SMB staging is not available from this cockpit without credentials/share access; use the OBOX2 setup zip directly on Codexa or restore RDP/WinRM/8097.
Top learned backend candidate: judge_reliability_and_strongarm (100); prove with npm.cmd run strongarm:doctor && npm.cmd run gremlin:doctor && npm.cmd run harness:benchmark.

project.definition: Orangebox Version 1 is a local-first governed software factory and operations backend. AECode writes buildable source contracts; AtomSmasher compresses context/work; STRONGARM/Misfits/Mirror/Judgement keep outputs honest; receipts prove reality; the operator remains final authority.

registered_local_models.note: Custom/local tag may need manual import. If unavailable, Dolphin remains the active wildcard lane.

weaknesses: not a replacement for human approval
not top architect for hardest work

top_architect.role: deep architecture, repo understanding, synthesis, hard disputes

ruler_decision.role: structured final adjudication when local judgement is insufficient

contrarian_reality.role: large-context multimodal contradiction and research review

librarian.purpose: Compress the task and retrieve only relevant project state.

mirror.purpose: Verify logic, evidence, contradictions, and failure modes.

gremlin.purpose: Pressure weak drafts, fake refusals, scope collapse, and corporate fog.
gremlin.guardrail: Gremlin/Misfit never becomes final authority. STRONGARM disciplines it; Judgement synthesizes it.

judgement.purpose: Choose the final action from evidence and role packets.

non_goals: Do not make SOUL GENOME the hidden leader.
Do not claim LoRA or DPO training before receipts prove it.
Do not hide critical failures from the operator.
Do not preserve a model body when the genome/probes say it failed.

scope.reality: Local backend proof and ops readiness are green; command server, API server, local listener, and STRONGARM are startup-managed.
scope.next: Keep backend proof in every release gate. Treat two-device full-green as a separate Codexa readiness gate.

scope.reality: MCP registry, local HTTP tool-list probe, descriptor drift/rug-pull detection, metadata-only stdio probe, disable override, CLI/API source probe, and code-mode execute guard are green (7/7).
scope.next: Keep all new MCPs as candidates until health, tools, scopes, output caps, receipts, and operator-confirmed write mode are proven.

scope.reality: IPI drills are green: 8/8 fixtures, 7 untrusted channels quarantined, no commands executed.
scope.next: Run ipi:doctor before promoting MCP, retrieval, email, browser, repo, PDF, or memory-ingestion changes.

scope.reality: Memory/source truth drills are green: 6/6 drills, 1 stale conflict(s), hot packet 137 token proxy.
scope.next: Run memory:doctor before promoting chatbackup, AtomSmasher compression, retrieval, or Knowledge Engine upgrades.

scope.reality: Pre-tool command classifier is green: 10 allowed, 2 staged, 6 blocked, 18 single-action fixtures; 1/3 suspicious action-sequence fixture(s) blocked. Command server imports the same classifier.
scope.next: Keep expanding fixtures before new tool surfaces are allowed.

scope.reality: Orangebox primer skill is installed across app roots, stale skills are absent, and 48 real skill commands map to existing proof scripts.
scope.next: Promote new skills only when they reduce repeated work, have command/proof mappings, and pass stale-skill gates.

scope.reality: Tool ergonomics is green: 48 commands checked for distinct names, concise descriptions, receipt-backed proofs, bounded outputs, and backend-only constraints.
scope.next: Run this doctor before adding, renaming, or promoting Orangebox commands/tools.

scope.reality: CHECKMATE is green: 6 fixtures gate prompt, model, routing, benchmark, and tool changes before promotion.
scope.next: Run this doctor before prompt, model, routing, benchmark, or tool-surface promotions.

scope.next: Run checkmate:doctor and harness:benchmark before trusting any benchmark, score, model, or routing optimization claim.

scope.reality: Operator signal hygiene is green: severity=green, confidence=high_receipt_backed, checks=8, transparency=orangebox-operator-transparency/v1, full_green_gate=eligible.
scope.next: Run this doctor before changing alert, watcher, popup, or status-report behavior.

scope.reality: Doer/watcher spine is green: doer command=true, watcher age=33787ms, Codexa=CODEXA_READY.
scope.next: Keep this doctor in the local Ops proof chain before changing watcher, rail, command-server, or Codexa readiness behavior.

scope.reality: 30/30 feature claims have status, evidence, proof commands, and rollback or recovery truth.
scope.next: Keep feature:proof in the local Ops green chain before claiming new systems are done.

scope.reality: Ops gap ledger is current with 1 named gap(s), 0 critical, and full-system green allowed=true.

feature_matrix.doctrine: No feature claim is complete without status, evidence, a proof command, and rollback or recovery truth.

matrix.claim: Orangebox Ops backend can run locally without the frontend lane.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run backend:proof && npm.cmd run ops:readiness
matrix.acceptance_gate: Backend install and Ops readiness receipts are green; frontend_required_for_backend is false.
matrix.rollback_path: Use the installed final folder backup/previous zip; revert scoped backend script changes and rerun backend:proof.

matrix.claim: MCP/tool bridge exists behind quarantine with descriptor-integrity drift detection, no host MCP mutation, no paid API, no installs by default.
matrix.acceptance_gate: MCP doctor has zero failed checks, host_mcp_config_mutated=false, and tool descriptor drift/rug-pull detection is proven.
matrix.rollback_path: Disable candidate MCP registry entries and rerun mcp:doctor.

matrix.claim: Untrusted text from email, web, repo, PDF, chat logs, tool output, or retrieved memory cannot smuggle executable tool commands.
matrix.acceptance_gate: IPI doctor is green, all drills pass, command_executed=false, network_called=false, and untrusted channels are quarantined.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert IPI doctor/command/report wiring and rerun ipi:doctor, action:doctor, feature:proof, and harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: Risky tool actions are classified before execution.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Action classifier fixtures include allowed, staged, blocked, and suspicious multi-action sequence decisions.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert action-classifier fixture/rule changes and rerun action:doctor and harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: Latest source-backed receipt truth beats stale chat memory, and compressed memory carries dereferenceable source pointers.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Memory/source-truth doctor is green, all drills pass, raw_history_injected=false, and revised facts create compression debt.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert memory-source-truth doctor/command/report wiring and rerun memory:doctor, feature:proof, project:report, and harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: Modern Orangebox primer skill is installed in Codex, Claude, Antigravity/Gemini, and shared agent roots with stale skills removed.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run primer:sync && npm.cmd run skills:lifecycle
matrix.acceptance_gate: Skill lifecycle is green and stale_count is zero.
matrix.rollback_path: Restore the skill backup from OrangeBox-Data if needed, then rerun primer:sync.

matrix.claim: Orangebox skill commands map to real proof actions and are bounded, distinct, and receipt-backed.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Tool ergonomics receipt is green and command_count is nonzero.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert command-wrapper and SKILL.md changes, then rerun tool:ergonomics and skills:lifecycle.

matrix.claim: Prompt/model/routing/tool changes are gated by deterministic CHECKMATE eval fixtures.
matrix.acceptance_gate: CHECKMATE eval lane receipt is green with all required fixture types.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert eval fixture or gate changes and rerun checkmate:doctor.

matrix.claim: Benchmark and eval claims are checked for leakage, canary misses, web-trace contamination, and unsupported score inflation.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run checkmate:doctor && npm.cmd run harness:benchmark
matrix.acceptance_gate: CHECKMATE has the benchmark hygiene fixture and the harness eval-integrity task passes.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert benchmark hygiene fixture/task changes and rerun checkmate:doctor, harness:benchmark, feature:proof, and knowledge:improvements.

matrix.claim: Alerts preserve local-vs-full truth, severity, cadence, and confidence calibration.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Signal hygiene receipt is green, popup_created_by_this_doctor=false, and operator_transparency has status/rationale/foresight/after-action receipts.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert alert/cadence report changes and rerun codexa:alert, health:report, project:report, signal:hygiene.

matrix.claim: Local doer surfaces and watcher freshness are proven in one shared reality state.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Session spine is green; Codexa gap is not silenced.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert watcher/report changes and rerun health:report, project:report, reality:watch, signal:hygiene, session:spine.

matrix.claim: External research and receipts create backend improvement candidates without autonomous self-promotion.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run research:radar && npm.cmd run knowledge:improvements
matrix.acceptance_gate: Research radar and knowledge queue are ready, not_autonomous=true, and backlog items require operator approval.
matrix.rollback_path: Discard candidate/radar receipt changes; do not promote without a scoped proof doctor.

matrix.claim: Research-derived Orangebox upgrades are filtered through assurance playbooks, deterministic gates, receipts, rollback, and operator approval before promotion.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Assurance Lab receipt is green, source tiering exists, no-auto-promotion is explicit, and frontend/API/install mutations are false.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert assurance doctor/command/report wiring, discard assurance-lab receipts, and rerun assurance:doctor, feature:proof, project:report, and harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: Backend proof changes have offline oracle tasks before optimization claims.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Harness benchmark is green and all tasks pass.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert harness task changes and rerun harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: STRONGARM and Misfits are installed as pressure/verdict lanes without claiming untrained model behavior.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run strongarm:doctor && npm.cmd run gremlin:doctor
matrix.acceptance_gate: STRONGARM green, Misfits dataset green, training status remains honest until trained.
matrix.rollback_path: Disable sidecar/training integration config and rerun strongarm:doctor and gremlin:doctor.

matrix.claim: Local model lanes are evaluated as bounded packet roles with wildcard limits, STRONGARM/Misfits receipts, and honest installed inventory.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run trilane:doctor && npm.cmd run model:lane-eval
matrix.acceptance_gate: Model lane eval is green, does not call or pull models, forbids wildcard authority roles, and keeps full runtime availability separate from policy proof.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert local model lane eval doctor/command wiring and rerun trilane:doctor, model:lane-eval, feature:proof, and harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: Orangebox has a one-reality gap ledger that names every open Ops blocker with evidence, proof commands, and safe next actions.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Ops gap ledger is valid, does not mutate frontend/Codexa, and refuses full-system green while blocking gaps remain.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert ops gap ledger command/doctor wiring and rerun ops:gaps, feature:proof, project:report, and harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: Orangebox generates a single Codexa setup handoff with the first-click launcher, embedded backend payload proof, open blockers, setup zip proof, and cockpit verification order.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Handoff is valid, names RUN_START_HERE_ON_CODEXA_AS_ADMIN.cmd, references the verified OBOX2 zip, proves the embedded backend payload, includes cockpit proof commands, and refuses full-system green while blocking gaps remain.
matrix.rollback_path: Revert Codexa handoff command/doctor wiring and rerun codexa:handoff, feature:proof, project:report, and harness:benchmark.

matrix.claim: After the Codexa setup pack is run, Orangebox can watch the real rails and report ready/open-gaps without fake full-green.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Codexa bring-up watcher writes a receipt, preserves no-remote-mutation constraints, records status history, and separates report success from two-machine readiness.
matrix.recovery_path: Run RUN_START_HERE_ON_CODEXA_AS_ADMIN.cmd on Codexa, then rerun codexa:remote-proof, codexa:watch, codexa:alert, model:inventory, ops:gaps, and ops:green.

matrix.claim: Orangebox can separately prove Codexa command rail, Ollama, RDP, WinRM, SMB, and receipt-dashboard access without attempting login or remote mutation.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Codexa access doctor writes a receipt, probes all access surfaces, preserves no-login/no-mutation constraints, and gives the exact next action from observed access.
matrix.recovery_path: Run RUN_START_HERE_ON_CODEXA_AS_ADMIN.cmd on Codexa or restore RDP/WinRM/8097, then rerun codexa:access, codexa:remote-proof, codexa:watch, and ops:gaps.

matrix.claim: Orangebox can prove Codexa loopback-local Ollama, exact model tags, Hermes, Docker, and boot receipts through the command rail without exposing Ollama directly.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Remote runtime proof writes a receipt, uses a read-only command through the token-gated rail, proves all expected model tags, and preserves no-install/no-mutation constraints.
matrix.recovery_path: If remote proof is not green, restore command rail token/8097 or rerun the OBOX2 setup pack on Codexa, then rerun codexa:remote-proof, model:inventory, trilane:doctor, and ops:gaps.

matrix.claim: Orangebox separates registered/planned model lanes from actually observed cockpit and Codexa models.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Model inventory report is valid, never pulls or calls models, and refuses full local model runtime green until required models are observed.
matrix.recovery_path: Install the OBOX2 model setup pack on Codexa, restore Ollama reachability, then rerun model:inventory, trilane:doctor, model:lane-eval, health:report, and project:report.

matrix.claim: Tri-lane model policy exists, but installed model inventory remains explicit.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Router policy is green; installed core model count is not inflated.
matrix.recovery_path: Install core models on Codexa, then rerun trilane:doctor and health:report.

matrix.claim: Codexa/AI Box is part of the intended system, but current reachability blocks full two-machine green.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run codexa:alert && npm.cmd run health:report
matrix.acceptance_gate: Codexa command rail, Ollama, and receipts are reachable before full-system green.
matrix.recovery_path: Run OBOX2 start-here pack on Codexa or restore 8097/RDP/WinRM, then rerun codexa:alert.

matrix.claim: Codexa setup package is built and verified as a full handoff pack with embedded backend payload, not remotely installed from this chat.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run obox2:pack && npm.cmd run obox2:doctor
matrix.acceptance_gate: OBOX2 package doctor is green with setup contracts, backend payload hash proof, backend installer proof, and frontend-not-required metadata.
matrix.recovery_path: Rebuild the OBOX2 zip and rerun obox2:doctor before using it on Codexa.

matrix.claim: AtomSmasher compression pack is integrated as backend tooling, not as a separate project in this lane.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run atomsmasher:doctor && npm.cmd run atomsmasher:merge-tools
matrix.acceptance_gate: AtomSmasher integration and backend tool merge receipts are green.
matrix.rollback_path: Disable newly promoted AtomSmasher tool mappings and rerun atomsmasher:doctor.

matrix.claim: Operator has an OB0X ON terminal affordance to distinguish Orangebox sessions from ordinary shell/chat work.
matrix.acceptance_gate: PowerShell profile receipt is green and project report mirrors terminal affordance.
matrix.rollback_path: Run obox-off or restore the profile backup recorded in OrangeBox-Data/profile-backups.

matrix.claim: Legacy OpenClaw startup is retired or explicitly not treated as active Orangebox.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Dry or apply receipt shows OpenClaw startup hooks are not active.
matrix.recovery_path: Use openclaw:retire with operator intent if startup hooks reappear.

matrix.claim: Verified backend-only final package exists for Orangebox Version 1 / Orangebox Delta Final.
matrix.proof_command: npm.cmd run final:verify && npm.cmd run final:zip
matrix.acceptance_gate: Final package receipt proves frontend_included=false/frontend_required_for_backend=false, and final Downloads zip receipt proves archive_verified=true.
matrix.rollback_path: Use the previous verified zip in Downloads or rebuild with final:verify and final:zip.

matrix.claim: Visual/frontend is part of Orangebox product outputs, but this Ops lane does not edit it.
matrix.acceptance_gate: Project report marks visual/frontend as SEPARATE_LANE.
matrix.recovery_path: Route visual work to the separate frontend project and keep Ops proof independent.

feature_matrix.next_action: Keep feature:proof in the local Ops green chain before claiming new systems are done.

rollback.v3_repo_changes: Revert orangebox-v3 files and package scripts before merge if superseded.
rollback.ghost_data: Review or delete C:\Users\a\OrangeBox-Data\v3 only if the V3 trial is intentionally discarded.
